evals.prompt: 檢查 fun facts 有沒有重複
evals.expected_output: Should review fun-facts.md, run check #1 (duplicates), report any pairs with line numbers
Should review fun-facts.md (default) with all 10 checks, report findings per check, end with summary table
Should review denomination-claims.md with all 10 checks, skip inapplicable checks with N/A
